package models

import (
    "database/sql"

    "github.com/swaggo/swag"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
)

type PatchUserRequest struct {
    Name string `json:"name"`
}

type NullableResponse struct {
    Description sql.NullString `json:"description"`
}

type CreateUpdateUserRequest struct {
    Name string `json:"name" binding:"required"`
}

type User struct {
    ID              string         `gorm:"column:id" json:"id" validate:"required" form:"id"`
    Name            string         `gorm:"column:name" json:"name"`
    Description     sql.NullString `gorm:"column:description" json:"description"`
    DisplayName     string         `gorm:"-" json:"display_name"`
    BillingCard     string         `gorm:"column:billing_card" json:"billing_card"`
    ShippingAddress string         `gorm:"column:shipping_address" json:"shipping_address"`
    ProfileAvatar   string         `gorm:"column:profile_avatar" json:"profile_avatar"`
    InventorySKU    string         `gorm:"column:inventory_sku" json:"inventory_sku"`
    TenantWorkspace string         `gorm:"column:tenant_workspace" json:"tenant_workspace"`
    Label           string         `gorm:"-" json:"label"`
    TotalCount      int            `gorm:"-" json:"total_count"`
}

type Audit struct {
    ID   string `gorm:"column:id"`
    Name string `gorm:"column:name"`
}

func (User) TableName() string {
    return "users"
}

func (Audit) TableName() string {
    return "audit_logs"
}

func (u *User) BeforeSave(tx *gorm.DB) error {
    _ = swag.NameStrategy{}
    tx.Model(&Audit{}).Create(&Audit{})
    tx.Model(&Audit{}).Where("audit_type = ?", "write").Where("audit_type = ?", "write").Delete(&Audit{})
    Publish("audit")
    return nil
}
